title: Turkish Lamb Pilaf for Post-Workout
description: A hearty and flavorful Turkish-inspired pilaf made with lamb and spices, perfect for a post-workout meal to replenish energy.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.notes: Choose leaner cuts for a healthier option

ingredients.name: Turkish Pilaf Rice
ingredients.notes: Use a mix specifically labeled as Turkish pilaf

ingredients.name: Dense Roast Carrots
ingredients.notes: Add for extra fiber and vitamins

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Saute with garlic for added flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use sea salt for better flavor

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove lamb from skillet and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add pilaf rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to skillet and bring to a boil.
Add lamb back into skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until rice is tender.
Stir in chopped carrots during the last 10 minutes of cooking.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
